name: Northwest Gold and Diamond
description_short: Northwest Gold & Diamond buys precious metals, diamonds, jewelry, watches, coins, and estate collections for cash across the Puget Sound region. Operating 33+ years with locations in Renton, Seattle, Bellevue, and Tacoma.
description_long:
Northwest Gold & Diamond has operated in the Puget Sound region for over 33 years, establishing itself as a precious metals and jewelry buyer with multiple service locations across Washington. The company serves customers in Renton, Kent, Auburn, Seattle, Bellevue, Covington, Tacoma, and Tukwila, positioning itself as a cash-for-valuables service in the traditional pawn and precious metals buying space.

The company offers cash purchases for gold, silver, platinum, diamonds, watches, coins, sterling silver, and estate collections. Beyond buying, they provide custom jewelry design, master repair services, and estate evaluations. They emphasize using "state of the art testing equipment" to assess precious metals and diamonds, and explicitly state they accept items that are "old and broken."

Northwest Gold & Diamond differentiates itself through claimed high payment offers—stating they "consistently pay more" than competitors and are "Puget Sound's #1 cash buyers." They highlight customer ratings of 5 stars on Yelp, CitySearch, and Google. The company guarantees payouts and positions expertise in wholesale diamonds and custom design as value-adds beyond typical cash-for-gold transactions.

The business model is straightforward: customers bring in precious metals or jewelry and receive immediate cash offers. However, like all pawn and precious metals buyers, there is inherent subjectivity in item valuations, and advertised "top prices" cannot be independently verified. The company operates as a traditional buyer-of-valuables rather than a lender, so no credit or financing products are offered. Customers should understand that selling to precious metals buyers typically yields less than retail value.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Over 33 years operating history in the Puget Sound region, indicating business longevity and established reputation
Multiple service locations across 8+ cities (Renton, Seattle, Bellevue, Tacoma, Kent, Auburn, Covington, Tukwila)
Claims to use state-of-the-art testing equipment for valuation of precious metals and diamonds
Accepts items in any condition—explicitly states "old and broken is OK"
Offers additional services beyond buying: custom jewelry design, master repair, and estate evaluations
Reports 5-star ratings on Yelp, Google, and CitySearch (user-generated reviews)
Immediate cash payment on transactions (no waiting period mentioned)
cons: No independent verification of claimed highest-payout or #1 buyer status; typical of buyer-of-valuables marketing
As a cash buyer (not lender), cannot help customers who need financing or credit access
Selling precious metals to any buyer yields significantly less than retail value, standard margin for the industry
Website provides limited detail on exact valuation methodology or how offers are calculated
Phone contact information only; no online quote or valuation tool available
best_for: People liquidating gold, diamonds, watches, or jewelry collections for immediate cash
Estate executors or heirs needing to quickly convert inherited precious metals and jewelry into cash
Individuals selling scrap or broken jewelry, coins, or bullion without concern for retail value
Customers in the Seattle-Tacoma-Bellevue area seeking local, in-person valuation and payment
diagnosis: Northwest Gold & Diamond is best for people in the Puget Sound region who want to sell precious metals, diamonds, jewelry, or estate items for immediate cash without hassle. The main caveat is that this is a buyer-of-valuables service, not a lender—it provides no credit, financing, or loan products, and customers should expect to receive wholesale/scrap prices significantly below retail value.
services: Jewelry buying (including broken or old jewelry)
Custom jewelry design and wholesale diamonds
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
